title: helianthemum maritimum
intro: Helianthemum maritimum, also known as Rockrose or Sea Rosemary, is a flowering plant species that is native to the coastal regions of Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Helianthemum maritimum include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
